description_long: This is a triangular road work detour ahead sign with a red border and a white background, mounted on a vertical gray post. The sign face features a bold black graphic depicting a car with stones or debris being projected from its wheels, warning of loose chippings or roadwork hazards ahead. The sign is constructed from a flat, metal sheet for the sign face, with the post likely made of galvanized steel for durability and weather resistance. The rear of the sign shows mounting brackets securing the sign to the post. The overall design is utilitarian, with clear, high-contrast graphics for maximum visibility in urban or roadside environments. No additional barriers or safety devices are attached to or surrounding the sign.
description: A triangular road work detour ahead sign with a red border, white background, and black hazard graphic, mounted on a gray metal post.
description_view_0: Front view showing the triangular sign face with red border, white background, and black hazard graphic.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the sign and the cylindrical post.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain gray back of the sign and the mounting brackets attaching it to the post.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and post alignment.
